summary_markdown:
# V3-EXQ-002r5 — SD-003 Self-Attribution (Reconstruction Loss Fix)

**Status:** FAIL
**Warmup:** 5 episodes, RANDOM policy + reconstruction loss (weight=1.0)
**Probe eval:** 2 grid resets x (near-hazard + safe positions)
**Seed:** 0

## r5 Design Change

EXQ-006 diagnostic found z_world does NOT encode hazard proximity (linear probe
accuracy = 0.693 = majority-class baseline). The world encoder discards hazard
features because E1 prediction loss alone does not require them.

r5 fix: reconstruction loss MSE(decoder(z_world), obs_world) forces z_world to
preserve full 175-dim observation content including hazard cell locations.
Mean reconstruction loss at end of training: 0.08966

## PASS Criteria

| Criterion | Result | Value |
|---|---|---|
| C1: TRAINED calibration_gap > 0.05 | FAIL | -0.0002 |
| C2: RANDOM abs(calibration_gap) < 0.10 | PASS | 0.0000 |
| C3: Warmup harm events > 100 | FAIL | 6 |
| C4: No fatal errors | PASS | 0 |
| C5: harm_eval non-degenerate | PASS | OK |
| C6: Probe coverage >= 10 each | FAIL | near=51 safe=1 |

## Calibration Results (Probe-Based)

| Condition | mean_causal_sig(near_hazard) | mean_causal_sig(safe) | calibration_gap |
|---|---|---|---|
| TRAINED | -0.0001 | 0.0001 | -0.0002 |
| RANDOM  | -0.0000 | -0.0000 | -0.0000 |

## Attribution Pipeline

```
z_world = encoder(obs_world)              # now trained with reconstruction loss
recon_loss = MSE(decoder(z_world), obs_world)   # forces hazard info preservation
z_world_actual = E2.world_forward(z_world, a_actual)
z_world_cf     = E2.world_forward(z_world, a_cf)
harm_actual    = E3.harm_eval(z_world_actual)
harm_cf        = E3.harm_eval(z_world_cf)
causal_sig     = harm_actual - harm_cf
```

Criteria met: 3/6 -> **FAIL**

## Failure Notes

- C1 FAIL: TRAINED calibration_gap -0.0002 <= 0.05
- C3 FAIL: warmup harm events 6 <= 100
- C6 FAIL: insufficient probes (near=51 safe=1)
